commands: echo '=== PHASE 1: Tear down current stack and wipe local volumes ==='
echo '=== PHASE 2: Download new managed compose file from S3 ==='
echo '=== PHASE 3: Verify RDS reachability from host ==='

timeout 10 bash -c 'until echo > /dev/tcp/erpnext-poc-erpnextdb-ooorv168mrw1.c2diyosis802.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com/3306; do sleep 2; done' && echo 'RDS reachable' || echo 'WARNING: RDS not reachable from host'
echo '=== Migration started. create-site and configurator are running in background. ==='
echo 'Check status in 3-5 minutes with ssm-check-migration.json'
